# Mindful Agile

> Leadership, agility and clarity — coaching and consulting for people and teams ready to grow with intention.

Mindful Agile blends agile coaching, leadership development and mindfulness practice to help individuals, leaders and organizations lead themselves first — and then everything else.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Mindful Agile and how we work.
- [Services](/services): Leadership Development, Agile Transformation, Self Leadership, and Career Consulting.
- [About](/about): Our philosophy, values, and engagement approach.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a discovery call or send a message.
